message:
feat: Implement socketserver, profile, and pdb infrastructure

socketserver.zig:
- Real buffered I/O in StreamRequestHandler (read/write/readline/flush)
- Socket timeout and Nagle algorithm control
- ForkingMixIn with fork(), waitpid(), active child tracking
- ThreadingMixIn with thread spawn, join, and detach support
- Error logging to stderr with client address

profile.zig:
- Profile enable/disable with is_enabled flag
- Stats sortStats/reverseOrder with sort state tracking
- Stats stripDirs for path simplification
- Stats printCallees showing caller relationships
- Profile run with timing infrastructure

pdb.zig:
- Debugger state (step_into, step_over, step_return modes)
- do_list with source file reading and line display
- do_print with frame locals/globals lookup
- do_help with detailed command documentation
- run/setTrace/postMortem entry points
- Module functions (set_trace, pm, run, runscript)
- hasBreakpoint helper for breakpoint visualization
